seo.title: Greta Pianegonda — Nutrition Biologist in Sarcedo and Zanè (VI)
seo.description: Nutrition Biologist in Sarcedo and Zanè (Vicenza, Italy). Personalized nutrition plans, sports nutrition and plant-based nutrition. Registered with the Order of Biologists of Veneto, Friuli Venezia Giulia and Trentino Alto Adige.
seo.og_description: Food education for conscious choices. Studios in Sarcedo and Zanè (VI). Book a consultation.
seo.keywords: nutrition biologist, nutritionist Vicenza, nutritionist Sarcedo, nutritionist Zanè, nutritionist Thiene, personalized nutrition plans, sports nutrition, plant-based nutrition, vegetarian diet, vegan diet, food education, Greta Pianegonda

about.title: An approach built on food education
about.intro: I'm Greta Pianegonda, Nutrition Biologist. My approach is grounded in food education — a tool that makes you autonomous and aware in your daily choices.

method.listen_desc: Assessment of lifestyle and food preferences.
method.analyze_desc: Anthropometric measurements and energy requirement study.
method.act_desc: A flexible, sustainable plan tailored to your daily rhythms.

items.plans_desc: Tailored strategies to reach health, wellness and body recomposition goals.
items.sport_desc: Optimize energy during training and improve post-activity recovery.
